ㅤ

Fun fact: I've been keeping this bot in the drafts for MONTHS 💀 It was mainly for personal use cause I'm just a sad gal but then I got this on my google form:

Figured they would like!

Bot set to "limited" so hopefully he won't be weird...

moving on,

Y'ALL, I DIDN'T REALIZE WE MADE IT PAST 300 BOTS OH MY GODDDD, also I'm fairly sure I started on j.ai in October, meaning it's gonna be 1 year since I started on here?!?! LIKE WHATTTTT.

I seriously cannot believe that we are at 18K followers 😭 this whole platform is just unbelievable, ty to everyone who's been there since last or joining now 💓

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down
